ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_sq_miles" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer (e.g., sergeant, lieutenant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the incident_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the incident */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the incident occurred */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or location of the incident */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the incident_types table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_crimes" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime associated with the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the crime (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_officers" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer responding to the incident */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time it took for the officer to respond to the incident */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_images_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_videos_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
